arts.sum: It’s a crunch match in Manchester this weekend, as Tottenham Hotspur travel to the Etihad Stadium to face a despondent Man City. Both sides are in the midst of a challenging spell, with City losing their last four games in all competitions and Spurs languishing in tenth position in the Premier League standings. arts.ttl: Angel Gomes: How Man Utd and Amorim should react to Spurs hijack
arts.sum: Angel Gomes played for Man Utd from youth level all the way up to the first team, featuring 10 times for the Red Devils, including five Premier League appearances. It must certainly be tempting for Man Utd to bring Angel Gomes back to the club from Lille .

arts.ttl: Ange: Spurs have issues, but mentality doesn't worry me
arts.sum: Tottenham have issues, but mentality isn't one of them. That's according to their head coach Ange Postecoglou.

arts.ttl: Manchester United eyeing Atalanta midfielder Ederson for January transfer window
arts.sum: Manchester United are preparing to make a strategic move in the upcoming January transfer window, with Atalanta midfielder Ederson emerging as a prime target for the club. Sky Sport Germany report that the 25-year-old Brazilian has caught the attention of new manager Ruben Amorim as he seeks to strengthen the team’s midfield options. Reports suggest that United are seriously considering Ederson, who has been a standout performer for Atalanta. The midfielder has been a consistent presence in the starting lineup, demonstrating versatility by playing in central and defensive midfield roles.
